briefing.title: 000 Test Mission
briefing.text: Baseline authored-start mission wrapper. This proves the new mission runtime can load an existing map through mission.json instead of loading the map directly.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Mission runtime online. Existing authored map loaded through mission data.
